query: Show me 5 closed Salesforce cases including their close date and description.
reasoning: The query specifically asks for closed cases, which can be obtained in a single call to the Salesforce agent. All required details (case close date and description) will be included in that data retrieval.

steps.task: Retrieve 5 closed cases from Salesforce, including their close date and description.

synthesis: Present the list of cases retrieved from step 1.
